Win a Classic
Mercedes-Benz 220

A 1972 W115 in Petrol Blue with Cognac leather interior, loaded with over R100,000 worth of Titleist golf gear.

What You Could Win

The Car

1972 Mercedes-Benz W115 220 in Petrol Blue with Cognac leather interior. Fully restored, ready to drive.

The Gear

Over R100,000 worth of premium Titleist equipment in the boot — drivers, irons, wedges, putters, bags, apparel & accessories.

The Fitting

A custom club fitting experience at the Titleist Performance Centre in Johannesburg.

How to Enter
1
Become a Wunderpar member

Download the Wunderpar app and create your free account to get started.

2
Every round you play with Wunderpar is an entry

Log your rounds through the app — each round earns you an automatic entry into the draw.

3
Every Watch to Earn you submit is an entry

Complete Watch to Earn challenges in the app for additional entries.

You can only enter by using the app
